name: haizotech
description: HaizoTech — public site, admin dashboard and common backend

scripts.gen:check: pnpm run gen && git diff --exit-code -- packages/types/src/generated || (echo '\n✖ Generated types are stale. Run `pnpm gen` and commit the result.\n' && exit 1)
scripts.verify: pnpm run spec:lint && pnpm run gen:check && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run lint && pnpm run build && pnpm run test
